dialogos.texto_en: (Ichika and Raiha, eh.\n I wonder what they're talking about?)
Hmm, something like that.
Hmm, I see. I see.\nSo you also like big bro's looks, huh.
Hey! You there!\nWhat are you guys talking about!!
Ah, big bro.\nRight now, I'm investigating\nwhat Ichika-san likes about you.
Raiha...\nSorry, Ichika. You can choose not to answer \nif you don't want to.
No, it's not a problem, it's fun!\nI get to talk about what I like about you.
Ah...\nIn that case, well, I guess it's fine.
Big bro, you're blushing hard.
Leave me alone...
Okay then, let's move on to the next question!\nAs a boyfriend, how many points would you give big bro?\nPlease give us your rating straight up.
Points, huh.\nI haven't thought about that before.\nGive me a second, I'll rate him right now.
...I never thought I would be rated \nbased on how good of a boyfriend I am.
But, big bro, you love tests, right?
I don't like these kinds of tests.
Okay, scoring is complete.\nNow, let me announce the score.\nFutaro-kun's score is%p-2;――
Is?
It's 100 points!
Ohh! Amazing!
No way.\nI didn't expect such a high rating.
Well, I'm surprisingly happy about it!\nI didn't expect to get a perfect score%p-2;――
However, it's only 100 out of 1000 points.
Wha?!
W-well, I knew I wasn't gonna score that high.\nAs expected, right? I don't really care, though?!
You look shocked, big bro!\nIt's written all over your face.
Now, cheer up, will you?
Are you going to make me feel all depressed\nand then try to cheer me up?
So then, Ichika-san!\nPlease tell us your points of dissatisfaction\nso big bro can try to improve his score.
Hmm, well first...
That's low...
You would've rated yourself more highly, \nFutaro-kun?
Well... I thought I'd get a little higher...
Really?\nWell then, what score did you think you'd get?\nOut of 1000?
About 650 points.
That number is too real, big bro.
I see. So you think it's above average.\nAs expected of a confident person.
St-stop it.
So then, Ichika-san!\nPlease tell us your points of dissatisfaction\nso big bro can try to improve his score.
(I want to hear it, but I also don't...)
Hmm, well first...
Well, I agree.\nI'm aware that I am lacking in some areas.
You're so humble, big bro...!
Nah, I don't remember being that arrogant\nin the first place.
You're right.\nYou only show some attitude when you're confident.
In other words,\nyou still lack confidence in romantic matters.
...Well, I admit that.
That's so you, Futaro-kun.\nThat's definitely a point in your favor.
Hmm, I guess that means Ichika-san also likes\nyour earnestness, big bro...I guess.
So then, Ichika-san!\nPlease tell us your points of dissatisfaction\nso big bro can try to improve his score.
Hmm, well first...
I think it's his manly side.\nMaking decisions and sticking to them.
I see, I see...wait, huh?
I think that is really cool of him.\nAnd also, hmm...
Accepting me for who I am, I guess.
Ohhh?
I'm sure that Futaro-kun\nwould accept everything about me.\nI feel safe when I'm with him.
Ichika-san, is that supposed to be an area\nwhere he needs improvement?\nThat sounds like a good trait.
Yeah, it's just one of his good points.\nI can't think of anything to complain about.
Then why is my score so low?
Well, it's because%p-2;――
I love you for who you are now, Futaro-kun,\nbut I think I'll start to love you even more from now on.
So the remaining 900 points will come eventually.\nWe need to leave some room for points, right?
I-I see...
I'm counting on you, you know?
Okay...
I-Ichika-san, you're amazing.\nYou've even got me all nervous...
Teehee, I'm an actress, you know.\nBut that wasn't an act.
Raiha-chan, what about you?\nDo you want to hear more good things\nabout Futaro-kun?
Yes, please!
Isn't that enough?\nIt's embarrassing to say more than that...
But it's so entertaining.\nThe big bro that Ichika-san is talking about\nand the one I know seem like different people.
So please, Ichika-san, tell us more.
Um, let's see%p-2;――
Oh, spare me...!
